title: phaseolus atropurpureus var. genuinus
intro: Phaseolus atropurpureus var. genuinus is a variety of the purple bean plant, which is native to the Americas and is a member of the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus atropurpureus var. genuinus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in weight management. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by drying the leaves and stems, which can then be used to make a variety of medicinal remedies.
